arts.ttl: Charlton Athletic v Leyton Orient: League One playoff final – live
arts.sum: League One playoff final at Wembley, 1.01pm BST kick-off Joy for Sunderland | Walsall’s rollercoaster | Email Taha This is a lovely interview with Martin Ling, Orient’s director of football. Charlton were victors in both league encounters with Orient; two injury-time goals secured a comeback win when the Addicks were visitors in March. Both goals came from corners, with Macaulay Gillesphey and Kayne Ramsay heading in, so it’ll be worth keeping an eye on Charlton’s set-pieces today. Continue reading...
